description_long: This is a rectangular, robust suitcase with a distinctive steampunk aesthetic, featuring a patchwork of brown metallic panels riveted together. The surface is composed of various shades of brown, giving it a weathered, industrial look. On the front, there is a visible padlock securing the lid, suggesting a secure locking mechanism. The hinges are visible on the back, indicating the lid opens from the front. The suitcase lacks any visible handles or wheels, emphasizing its sturdy, utilitarian design. There are no external pockets or brand logos present, and the overall construction appears solid and heavy-duty.
description: A brown, riveted metal suitcase with a padlock on the front, featuring a patchwork of metallic panels and no visible handles or wheels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the padlock and the detailed riveted metal panels.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the continuous patchwork metal design with no visible handles or features.
description_view_2: Back view revealing two metal hinges and the same riveted panel construction.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with uninterrupted metal panels and no additional features.
